name: a canonical source is acquired whole — every guideline becomes a rule, not only technology-mentioning lines
command: ID=P562S04; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --cache fc --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; K=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --project $ID --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].select{|x|x["origin"]=="project"}.length'); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$K" -ge 3 ] && echo whole-source-all-lines 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p fc && printf '%s\n' 'A guideline with no framework name.' 'Another plain guideline.' 'Keep components small.' > fc/vuejs-style-guide.txt
